title: Semolina Serenade
description: A sweet and silky Indian dessert featuring semolina that is perfect for a romantic dinner or as a treat.

ingredients.name: 1 cup semolina (gluten-free if needed)
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free semolina for those with dietary restrictions.

instructions: Combine semolina and water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with 2 tablespoons of water until smooth. Add this mixture along with remaining water to the pan.
Stir in coconut milk, salt, and sugar; cook and stir until thickened, about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat, stir in cardamom, and set aside.
Serve warm, topped with additional coconut cream.
